data.content: Branch knots-040c-loom-prompt-coverage adds 15 tests (11 compat harness + 4 skill lookup) proving Loom-first prompt resolution. Compat harness tests cover builtin profiles resolving all action states from Loom bodies, render_for_profile for branch/PR variants, peek/claim for builtin and custom workflows, coexistence after custom install, and no-planning profile behavior. Skill lookup tests cover resolve_skill_by_name for builtin implementation, all 7 builtin action states, and resolve_skill_for_knot for both builtin and custom workflows. All 833 tests pass, coverage 95.21%, make sanity green.
